markdown:
# Potion of Healing

This potion is a magic item. As a [[bonus_action]], you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 [[hit_points]]. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.
